zh.lifeSummary: 當William of Carrington於1230年出生在英國爾卡林頓時，他的父親Sir William of Carrington25歲，母親Ciceley de Massey II23歲。他於1258年與Agnes de Toft在英國爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1274年在他的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William of Carrington于1230年出生在英国爾卡林頓时，他的父亲Sir William of Carrington25岁，母亲Ciceley de Massey II23岁。他于1258年与Agnes de Toft在英国爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1274年在他的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William of Carrington was born in 1230, in Carrington, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir William of Carrington, was 25 and his mother, Ciceley de Massey II, was 23. He married Agnes de Toft in 1258, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1274, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William of Carrington est né en 1230, à Carrington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William of Carrington, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ciceley de Massey II, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Toft en 1258, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1274, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William of Carrington 1230 in Carrington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William of Carrington 25 und seine Mutter Ciceley de Massey II 23. Er hat 1258 in Cheshire, England Agnes de Toft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1274 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William of Carrington è nato il nel 1230 nel Carrington, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William of Carrington, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Ciceley de Massey II, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Toft nel 1258, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1274, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William of Carringtonが1230年にイギリスチェシュアイアカーリントンで生まれた時，父Sir William of Carringtonは25歳，母Ciceley de Massey IIは23歳であった。1258年にイギリスチェシュアイアでAgnes de Toftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1274年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William of Carrington(이)가 1230년 영국 체실르 카링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William of Carrington(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ciceley de Massey II(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1258년 영국 체실르에서 Agnes de Toft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1274년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William of Carrington nasceu em 1230, em Carrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William of Carrington, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ciceley de Massey II, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Toft em 1258, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1274, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William of Carrington родился в 1230 г. в местности каррингтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William of Carrington было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ciceley de Massey II, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Toft в 1258 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1274 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William of Carrington nació en 1230, en Carrington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William of Carrington, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Ciceley de Massey II, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Agnes de Toft en 1258, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1274, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
